title: T-014 — mv_integration_health + mv_rules_usage cross-outbox UNION MVs (12-REPORTING §12.2, §4.1 #9/#10)
prompt:
# T-014 — Integration Health + Rules Usage MVs

PRD: docs/prd/12-REPORTING-PRD.md §12.1 outbox consumer pattern, §12.2 mv_integration_health UNION DDL, §9.1 mv_rules_usage, §4.1 #9 + #10
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Create `mv_integration_health` (cross-outbox UNION across stages 1/2/3/5 P1 plus 4/6 P2 when present) and `mv_rules_usage` (consumer of 02-SET `rule_evaluations` audit). Read-only — 12-REPORTING never writes to outbox tables (PRD §12 "12-REPORTING NIE produkuje eventow"). IF EXISTS guards for outbox tables that may not yet be deployed (Auditor A: 11-SHIPPING is 0-tasks, 10-FINANCE is 0-tasks).

## Implementation contract
1. Migration `packages/db/migrations/0088_reporting_mv_integration_health.sql`:
   - `mv_integration_health (stage TEXT, target_system TEXT, org_id UUID, pending_count, dispatching_count, failed_count, dlq_depth, avg_latency_5min_sec)` per PRD §12.2 DDL but with `org_id` not `tenant_id`.
   - UNION ALL across these outbox tables WHEN present (IF EXISTS guard each branch): items_outbox_events (stage 1), production_outbox_events (stage 2), shipping_outbox_events (stage 3, optional), warehouse_outbox_events (stage 4 P2, optional), finance_outbox_events (stage 5, optional), rma_outbox_events (stage 6 P2, optional).
   - `mv_rules_usage (rule_id, org_id, eval_count_24h, trigger_rate_pct, avg_latency_ms)` reading from 02-SET `rule_evaluations` audit table.
   - Unique indexes on both for REFRESH CONCURRENTLY.
   - REVOKE PUBLIC + GRANT app_reporting_role.
2. Drizzle entries + service helpers `packages/reporting/src/queries/{integration-health,rules-usage}.ts` with org+site guardrail.
3. Register both view names in `packages/reporting/src/mv-registry.ts` enum.
4. Vitest contract test: (a) MVs + unique indexes exist, (b) UNION includes only present outbox tables (gracefully degrades), (c) cross-org leak test, (d) DLQ depth correctly counts `status='in_dlq'` rows, (e) avg_latency_5min computed only over rows with delivered_at > now() - interval '5 min'.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0088_reporting_mv_integration_health.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/reporting-views.ts [modify]
- packages/reporting/src/queries/integration-health.ts [create]
- packages/reporting/src/queries/rules-usage.ts [create]
- packages/reporting/src/mv-registry.ts [modify]
- packages/reporting/__tests__/mv-integration-health.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 0088 runs in DB where stages 1/2 outbox tables exist and stages 3/4/5/6 are absent, when mv_integration_health is inspected, then it contains UNION of stages 1+2 only — no error from absent tables.
2. Given stage 3 (shipping) outbox table is later added, when forward-script is applied or the migration re-runs, then stage 3 rows appear in mv_integration_health without manual intervention.
3. Given two orgs have produced outbox events, when service helper queries under each org session, then cross-org leak test passes.
4. Given an outbox row has status='in_dlq', when mv_integration_health is refreshed, then dlq_depth for that stage increments by 1.
5. Given REFRESH MATERIALIZED VIEW CONCURRENTLY mv_integration_health runs from the T-005 worker, when complete, then unique index lookup ensures correctness; mv_refresh_log row written.

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: `packages/reporting/__tests__/mv-integration-health.test.ts` covers 5 ACs with testcontainers Postgres; scenarios with subsets of outbox tables present.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/reporting test mv-integration-health`.
- GREEN: write migration with IF EXISTS UNION branches + Drizzle + helpers + enum.

## Risk red lines
- Do not write to outbox tables from reporting (§12.1 "NIE produkuje eventow").
- Do not let migration fail when stages 3/4/5/6 outbox tables are absent — IF EXISTS guards per branch.
- Do not use `tenant_id` column name in PRD-cited DDL — Wave0 v4.3 mandates `org_id`.
- Do not skip unique index on the MVs.
- Do not GRANT to PUBLIC.
- Do not let `avg_latency_5min` window leak beyond 5 min ("delivered_at > now() - interval '5 min'" must be present per PRD §12.2 DDL).
- Do not couple to 02-SET rule_evaluations internals beyond the published consumer column set.

pipeline_inputs.description: Integration Health + Rules Usage MVs. Cross-outbox UNION with IF EXISTS guards for not-yet-deployed modules. Consumer-only pattern; never writes to outbox.
pipeline_inputs.details: UNION across stage 1/2 (P1) + 3 (optional) + 4 P2 + 5 (optional) + 6 P2 outbox tables. Wave0 org_id naming overrides PRD §12.2 tenant_id label.

Do not implement DLQ replay UI (separate admin task)
